title: Tech Decorators
description: **Tech Decorator** It is a module that leans towards "technical decoration" for decorative purposes. At present, most of the content in this module is not yet interactive
body:
# Lamp ↑, etc ↘ lamp ↗ etc. ↘ lamp ↗
**Tech Decorator** It is a module that leans towards "technical decoration" for decorative purposes. At present, most of the content in this module is not yet interactive

## update
- This mod will only support version 1.20.1 in the future (no plans for downward or upward updates)
- other unexpected ideas

## support
Author making Tech Decorator in his spare time. If you like this mod or have a brilliant idea and want to help the author, welcome。
also Due to the use of machine translation for English translation, please I if there are any translation issues

Using MCreator to create 

**I wish you a happy life**
